channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cadex Defence says its rifles reached Russia through unauthorized diversion despite sanctions
item.description: A Quebec-based firearms manufacturer, Cadex Defence, says an internal investigation has confirmed that some of its rifles ended up in Russia through fraudulent diversion, without the company’s knowled...

item.title: PM Modi Visits Amsterdam to Strengthen Trade, Clean Energy, and Bilateral Ties
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has reached Amsterdam for a two-day official visit, following his recent trip to the United Arab Emirates. The visit, taking place from May 15 to 17, 2026, is aimed at str...

item.title: Illegal Wildlife Trade in the Himalayas Poses Serious Threat to Biodiversity and Local Communities
item.description: A recent study highlights a worrying surge in illegal wildlife trade across the Hindu Kush Himalaya, spanning eight countries including India, China, Nepal, and Bhutan. The trade has reportedly double...

item.title: Tanzania Focuses on Ports, Energy and Industrial Zones to Attract Investment at GAIS
item.description: Tanzania don highlight some key sectors dem wan push to attract both private and institutional capital using the Global Africa Investment Summit (GAIS). Di country dey focus on ports, logistics, energ...

item.title: Ndindi Nyoro Urges Government to Cut Taxes and Levies to Lower Fuel Prices
item.description: Nairobi — Kiharu MP Ndindi Nyoro has called for immediate government action to reduce fuel prices, following the Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority's (EPRA) announcement of significant price hi...

item.title: Colorado Governor Jared Polis commutes Tina Peters’ sentence, drawing criticism from fellow Democrats
item.description: Colorado Governor Jared Polis reduced the prison sentence of former county clerk Tina Peters, a figure associated with election denial claims, from nine years to four and a half years. The commutation...

item.title: Young London Jobseekers Face Growing Challenges Amid High Youth Unemployment
item.description: At Westfield White City, London’s largest shopping centre, hundreds of young people attended the capital’s biggest career event, not for shopping, but to seek employment. The London Job Show hosts a v...

item.title: SpaceX Accelerates Plans for Nasdaq IPO with June 11 Pricing Target
item.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is moving quickly with its initial public offering plans. According to sources familiar with the matter, the rocket and satellite company now aims to price its shares as early as Ju...

item.title: Talos Unveils Limited-Edition Carbon Fibre Porsche 911 RT with Enhanced Performance
item.description: Yorkshire-based tuner and resto-modder Talos has unveiled its latest creation: the ultra-exclusive Porsche 911 RT, limited to just 20 units globally. Based on the 911 GT3 RS and inspired by the legend...

item.title: Tanzanian Businessman Mo Dewji Recognised Globally for Philanthropy
item.description: Tanzanian tycoon Mohammed Dewji has been recognised as one of the world’s top 100 philanthropists in the Time100 Philanthropy 2026 list. Time highlighted Dewji as one of Africa’s youngest billionaires...

item.title: INEC Confirms Receipt of Membership Registers from All 22 Political Parties Ahead of 2027 Election
item.description: The Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) don announce say all 22 registered political parties for Nigeria don submit their membership registers as required by the Electoral Act 2026, in pr...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee Addresses Party Members After TMC’s West Bengal Election Loss
item.description: Following All India Trinamool Congress’s (TMC) significant defeat in the 2026 West Bengal assembly elections, party chief Mamata Banerjee addressed party members at her Kalighat residence on Saturday....

item.title: Mitch Marner Thrives Post-Leafs: Lessons for Toronto’s Team Management
item.description: Mitch Marner’s performance in the playoffs with the Vegas Golden Knights highlights the challenges he faced during his tenure with the Toronto Maple Leafs. While in Toronto, Marner often appeared over...

item.title: Thousands of Australians face loss of Dutch citizenship due to strict nationality laws
item.description: Since the late 19th century, the Netherlands has enforced strict rules that make it difficult for citizens to hold dual nationality. Thousands of Dutch-born Australians have lost their citizenship aut...

item.title: University of the Philippines study tracks 1,368 marine mammal strandings from 2005 to 2022
item.description: A collaborative study by the University of the Philippines (UP) and the University of Canberra documented 1,368 marine mammal stranding events across the Philippines over an 18-year period, from 2005 ...

item.title: Tambuwal Explains Why Peter Obi and Kwankwaso Left ADC
item.description: Former Sokoto State Governor, Senator Aminu Tambuwal, don talk say the exit of Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso from the African Democratic Congress (ADC) no be because of any quarrel or crisis inside th...

item.title: Prime Minister Directs Tighter Import Controls and End to Tax Incentives for Locally Made Goods to Boost Tanzanian Industries
item.description: On February 12, 2026, Prime Minister Mwigulu Nchemba issued important directives during the launch of a new steel sheet manufacturing plant by Lodhia Group in Mkuranga, Pwani Region. He instructed the...

item.title: Bato dela Rosa Under Immigration Lookout; Senate Shooting Investigation Ongoing
item.description: On May 15, 2026, significant developments unfolded in Philippine politics and public safety. Senator Bato dela Rosa is now under an immigration lookout order, raising questions about his movements and...

item.title: US-China Security Tensions During Trump-Xi Beijing Summit
item.description: During President Trump’s visit to Beijing, what seemed like warm camaraderie between him and Xi Jinping for cameras was shadowed by intense friction between US and Chinese security officials. The summ...

item.title: Experts Debunk Spencer Pratt's Claims About 'Super Meth' Amid LA Mayoral Race
item.description: Spencer Pratt, former reality TV star and current Los Angeles mayoral candidate, has been using the term 'super meth' throughout his campaign to portray a heightened drug crisis affecting the city’s h...
